issues.description: Targeted Vitest validation could not be executed in this read-only/restricted environment because Vite/esbuild failed at startup with `spawn EPERM`. Static review found r1 P1 and r2 P2 closed: stale in-flight tokens no longer repopulate cache after `disconnectSocket()`, resilience now lives inside the shared pending promise, and `finally` only clears the matching pending promise.
issues.recommendation: Run `npx vitest run src/features/space/socket/internal/socket-client.test.ts src/features/space/socket/internal/use-socket.test.ts` in a normal dev environment to confirm runtime behavior.
